idea.title: Asteroid Farm Rush
idea.hook: Harvest growing asteroids before they spoil; time your clicks to maximize yield and prevent cross-contamination
idea.prototype: Space arena grid of asteroids in growth stages (seedling->growing->ripe->spoiled). Tap to harvest ripe asteroids; spoiled ones corrupt adjacent cells each tick. Score = yield harvested; lose = 5 spoiled asteroids on board simultaneously.
idea.mutation_of: The last of the asteroids + Hell farm
idea.why_novel: Inverts asteroid shooter into survival harvesting — asteroids are resources, not threats; pressure comes from spoilage cascade, not enemies
idea.non_timer_pressure: 5-spoiled-cell limit; spoilage cascade spreads to neighbors; harvest windows narrow as waves escalate; scarce Cleanse/Freeze charges

sources.note: Highest-confidence web-first candidate of the day; danger_combat CTR angle.

synthesizer_brief: Market-anchor slot from daily-mix 2026-06-11: highest-confidence web-first candidate (total 80.9, web 76.9); danger_combat CTR angle.

alternatives.title: Cube Defense Spin
alternatives.hook: Rotate placed cubes mid-wave to shift defense properties

alternatives.title: Monkey Trap Architect
alternatives.hook: Place blocks to intercept monkeys — 5 moves per round
alternatives.mutation_of: Monkey Tag IO + Blocky Blast Puzzle
alternatives.why_novel: real-time tag converted to spatial prediction puzzle
